$comment: scripts/SilphCo11F.asm — Giovanni #2 guards the president's office (OPP_GIOVANNI party 2). On the win the flag is set BEFORE his parting line, then GBFadeOutToBlack, TEAM ROCKET leaves under the dark (the refresh_objects sweep — this floor's rockets and Giovanni; other floors + Saffron's streets flip at load from the same flag), Delay3, GBFadeInFromBlack (gh #158).

commands.text:
Ah {player}!
So we meet again! The PRESIDENT and
I are discussing a
vital business
proposition. Keep your nose out
of grown-up
matters... Or, experience a
world of pain!

then.text:
Arrgh! You are stronger
than I expected! Again, you ruined
our plans for
SILPH! But TEAM ROCKET
won't give up!
